titleStmt.title: SII 23.361: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 361. (A.R. No. 361 of 1907.) Āḍuturai, Papanasam Taluk, Tanjavur District Āpatsahāyēśvara temple—on the west wall of the central shrine Rājak: Kulōttuṅga-Chōḷa I: year 28: 1097-98 A.D.

summary.p: This is damaged. The introduction begins with the words Pugaḻ mādu viḷaṅga. The inscription records a gift of 3(1/4) kaḻañju of gold to the temple for burning a perpetual lamp, by one I[rugaṇ]ḍi-Uḍaiyāṉ of Ambar in Ambar-nāḍu. Tiraimūrnāḍu in which Tirukkuraṅgāḍutuṟai was situated is said to have formed a division of Ulaguyyakkoṇḍaśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pukaḻmātu viḷaṅka jayamātu
virumpa malarmakaḷ puṇara Urimaiyil
ciṟanta maṇimuṭi cūṭi minavar nilaikeṭa pallavar
Iriyal Iṭṭoṭa tikkanaittum tan cakkara naṭātti vira
siṁhāsanattu puvaṉimuḻutuṭaiyāḷḷoṭum viṟṟirunta
ruḷina kovirājakesari panmarāna cakravattikaḷ śrīkolo
ttuṅka coḻadevarkku yāṇṭu Irupatteṭṭāvatu Ula
kuyyakkoṇṭa coḻavaḷanāṭṭu tiraimūrnāṭṭu tirukkuraṅ
kāṭutuṟai mahādevarkku Iṉnāṭṭu Amparnāṭṭu Am
par Uṭaiyārpakkal Ik
koyil civabrāhmaṇarom cantrātittaval tiru
nontāviḷakku Onṟum Erikka kaṭavomāka Irukaṇ
ṭi Uṭaiyānpakkal nāṅkaḷ koṇṭa pon mukkaḻai
ñcekālum koṇṭu Ippoṉṉukku palicai cekuttu
Ittirunontāviḷakku Oṉṟum cantrātittaval Ikkoyi
civabrāhmaṇarom Ittiru
nontāviḷakkoṉṟum Erikkakaṭavomānom Itu
panmāyeśvara Irakṣai ..
Digital edition of SII 23.361 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
